title: MeshAd Telemetry Event — v1
description: The COMPLETE closed allowlist of data that may leave a developer's machine. Any payload containing fields outside this schema MUST be rejected in full by both client and gateway. Changes require a major version, public announcement and re-consent.

anon_id.description: Locally generated random UUID. No relation to hardware. User-rotatable at any time.

duration_ms.description: Only present on idle_end and impression events.

ad_id.description: Only present on impression and click events.
